summary: Fixes Inbox layout by replacing the detail toolbar with a shared chrome bar.

fixed: Inbox no longer breaks the header — status bar spans the full window above the sidebar and detail panes
Sidebar brand and Inbox menu stay visible below the traffic lights instead of drawing under the title bar
Only the active workspace is mounted, so Gmail web views cannot bleed through from hidden panes
Removed duplicate Nucleus title from the Inbox header that overlapped the toolbar area
